src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for SpringBootServletInitializer to reflect the package restructure in Spring Boot 2.x.
Update import for DefaultProfileUtil to reflect the package restructure in JHipster libraries.
Update imports to use the new tech.jhipster.config package structure instead of the old io.github.jhipster.sample.config.
Replace references to local Constants class with JHipsterConstants from the new library.
Update server property keys to match Spring Boot 2.x conventions (e.g., server.servlet.context-path).
Replace JHipsterProperties with ApplicationProperties in the configuration properties binding.
Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to comply with Spring Framework 5.x requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: extends WebMvcConfigurerAdapter implements EnvironmentAware -> implements WebMvcConfigurer

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the EnvironmentAware interface implementation and associated property resolver logic as it is no longer needed or supported in the new configuration style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed implements EnvironmentAware, setEnvironment method, and RelaxedPropertyResolver field.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for AngularCookieLocaleResolver to use the new tech.jhipster package structure.
Remove dependency on javax.annotation.PostConstruct which is deprecated in Java 11 and removed in Java 11+ modules without explicit dependency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @PostConstruct annotation and moved initialization logic into the constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on javax.inject.Inject which is part of the Java EE API not included in standard Java 11 distributions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import javax.inject.Inject and replaced with constructor injection.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove Dropwizard Metrics servlet filter and servlet registration code that is no longer part of the standard JHipster configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for com.codahale.metrics, removed MetricRegistry and HazelcastInstance fields, and deleted the initMetrics method and its invocation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x EmbeddedServletContainerCustomizer with Spring Boot 2.x WebServerFactoryCustomizer or remove if unused.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed implementation of EmbeddedServletContainerCustomizer and the customize method, as the new Spring Boot 2.x API uses WebServerFactoryCustomizer (though not explicitly added here, the old interface is removed).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the new Spring Boot 2.x Profiles API.
